seo.title: Goyfield - Arknights Endfield Pull Tracker
seo.description: Advanced Pull Tracker for Arknights: Endfield. Track your pull history, calculate pity counters, and predict your next guaranteed operator or weapon.
seo.keywords: Arknights Endfield, Arknights, Gacha Tracker, Pull History, Operators, Аркнайтс Эндфилд, Аркнайтс, Трекер гачи, История круток, Оперативники, Гойфилд мое, Гойфилд, Goyfield

hints.editPotential: To change weapon potentials, click the pencil icon.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.analytics_text1: We use Firebase Analytics (Google Analytics) to collect traffic and performance metrics to improve Goyfield.moe.
privacy.analytics_text2: Goyfield.moe uses localStorage technology to store your user preferences (e.g., selected server, theme, language) and pull history data locally on your device.
privacy.tracker_text1: By default, all imported pull data is saved locally on your device. Your import link (containing a temporary token) is sent to the Goyfield.moe backend server solely to connect with the official game API and retrieve your history. The link itself, tokens, or any personal account data are not shared with third parties and are not stored on the server in plain text.
privacy.tracker_text2: In the event of a system error during import, the link may be temporarily saved in the administrator logs to identify and fix bugs.
privacy.global_text: When you import your history, certain anonymized information about your pulls (item type, rarity, time, banner) is saved on our server. This data is linked to an anonymous generated identifier (UID) and is used to power the "Global Statistics" section.
privacy.cloud_text1: Goyfield.moe provides the option to link your Google account to create cloud backups of your pull data. Your username and email address are displayed solely within the settings interface and are not shared with third parties.
privacy.cloud_text2: Unlike local storage, when using this feature, your pull data is securely stored in our cloud database (Firebase). You can sign out of your account at any time via Settings.

import.title: Import Headhunting Records
import.overwriteDesc: Use this option only if your rating stats are doubled or showing incorrect numbers. The system will strictly recalculate your rating from the local pull history.
import.instruction: Paste the URL from the search history obtained in the game:
import.step1: Launch Arknights Endfield and open pull history.
import.step2_post: , paste and hit Enter. The link will be copied automatically.
import.ps_tooltip: Press Win + R, type powershell, and hit Enter

status.error_invalid_url: Invalid link. Make sure it's a link from Gryphline.
status.error_failed: Error loading. The token may have expired.

import.faq_security_desc3: Running the PowerShell scripts does not require running PowerShell as administrator.
import.faq_q1: Is it dangerous to use scripts?
import.faq_security_desc1: Sharing authorization tokens with third-party sites and executing scripts always carries risks.
import.faq_security_desc2: Goyfield.moe never saves your personal information, such as tokens and links. Your token is only processed to retrieve pulls and is never saved. If you have any concerns about the scripts, you can inspect them personally. If you are concerned about sending your token to the site's backend server, you can deploy the site locally following the instructions on GitHub, as this is an open-source project.
import.faq_security_warning: If you used the Endfieldrecords site, change your in-game password immediately and follow the Reddit guide to check your computer.
import.description: Upload a JSON file with your gacha history.
import.format: (Currently only Genshin-like API response format is supported).
import.successMessage: ✓ Data successfully updated! Go to the home page to view statistics.
import.scriptInstruction: Copy the script below, open PowerShell, paste, and press Enter. The URL will be copied automatically
import.save_desc_url: Saves the link in browser for quick access. The validity period of the link may vary.
import.save_desc_token: Saves the token in browser for quick access. The validity period of the token may vary.
import.errHistoryEmpty: The history is empty or the link is outdated. UID not found.
import.pc_web_step1: Log in to your account at
import.pc_web_step2: On the bookmarks bar (press Ctrl + Shift + B to show it), click 'Add page', give it any name, and paste this code into the URL field:
import.pc_web_step3: While on the website, click that bookmark — the link will be copied.
import.pc_web_hint: This method is safe and works directly through your browser.
import.manual_text_mid: open it with Notepad, scroll to the very bottom and find a link like
import.android_note: Apps like ByeByeDPI or active VPNs may interfere with log capturing. If logs are empty, try reinstalling VPN.
import.android_s1: Download Shizuku and LogFox from GitHub.
import.android_s2: Connect to Wi-Fi. Open Shizuku (allow notifications).
import.android_s3: Under «Start via Wireless Debugging», tap Pairing → Developer Options.
import.android_s3_sub2: Tap the «Wireless Debugging» text itself, then select Pair device with pairing code.
import.android_s3_sub3: Enter the pairing code into the Shizuku notification. (For ColorOS and some other OS users: also enable «Disable permission monitoring» in Developer Options).
import.android_s4: Return to Shizuku and tap Start (under Wireless Debugging).
import.android_s6: In «Settings» → «UI»: enable «Expand logs». In «Log format», check all checkboxes.
import.android_s7: Go to the main LogFox screen and tap the Play (▶) button to start logging.
import.android_s8: Open the game. Access Gacha History or News (the token also appears during the «Welcome...» login message).
import.android_s9: Return to LogFox, stop logging. Tap the search icon and search for: "token" (with quotes).
import.android_s10: Find the long entry. Copy the token (it's inside quotes and usually ends with =).
import.ios_step1: Download the Stream app from the App Store.
import.ios_step2: Open the app and allow VPN configurations in system settings («Settings» → «General» → «VPN & Device Management»).
import.ios_step3_1: Tap Sniff Now in the Stream app.
import.ios_step4: Go to «Settings» → «General» → «VPN & Device Management» → Tap on Stream Generated CA and install the profile.
import.ios_step5: Go to «Settings» → «General» → «About» → «Certificate Trust Settings» → Toggle the switch next to Stream Generated CA.
import.ios_step6: Launch Arknights Endfield, open the pull history page, and keep it open.
import.ios_step7: Return to the Stream app and tap the large Sniff Now button.
import.ios_step8: Return to the game and refresh the history page (switch tabs or reopen it).
import.ios_step9: Return to Stream and tap Stop Sniffing.
import.ios_step10: Go to Sniff History. Find the request starting with https://ef-webview.gryphline.com
import.ios_step11: Open it, go to the Request tab, and copy the link (starts with https).
import.error_token_name: Token name is required for saving
import.error_domain: Invalid game link. Domain not supported
import.error_rate_limit: Too many requests. Please wait a minute.
import.error_no_data: No pulls found or Link Expired
import.error_invalid_token: Token is invalid or expired. Please log into the game and generate a new link.
import.error_account_mismatch: Account Mismatch! You already have history between {start} and {end}, but the imported data differs completely. Please check if you selected the correct account.
import.recoveryTooltip: Checking this box will force recovery of pull history if applicable. This can help in case of partial loss of pull records.
import.error_account_mismatch_recovery: Account Mismatch! No matching records found even in recovery mode. Please check if you selected the correct account.

account.title: Select Account
account.rename_desc: Enter a new name for this account
account.clearDescription: This will permanently delete all pull history for the current account. This action cannot be undone.
account.deleteModalDesc: You are about to delete the account «{name}» and all its data. This action cannot be undone.

server.title: Select server
server.hint: The selected server affects the time display on the website
server.show_server_time_desc: Use server time (Global: UTC-5 / Asia: UTC+8) for banner and event schedules instead of the device's local time

cloud.title: Cloud Synchronization
cloud.description: Goyfield syncs data with Google to save your pull history. If sync is disabled, clearing cache or reinstalling the browser will delete all pull data. Goyfield can only access its own files.
cloud.cloudNewerAlert: Cloud data is newer. Do you want to download it and overwrite your local data?
cloud.localNewerMsg:
Your local data has changes.
Use upload to overwrite cloud, or download to replace local data.

backup.title: Backup
backup.description: Backups contain data for all accounts on this device. Before importing, it is highly recommended to export your current data, as restoring a full backup will overwrite all local history.
backup.success_import_full: Full system backup restored successfully! Reloading...
backup.error_too_large: File is too large! Maximum allowed size is 10MB.
backup.error_invalid_format: Unknown file format. The file is neither a Full Backup nor recognizable Pull Data.
backup.confirm_full_desc: WARNING: This is a Full System Backup. Restoring it will COMPLETELY OVERWRITE all accounts and history on this device. This cannot be undone.
backup.confirm_pulls_desc: This is a pull data file. Do you want to import and MERGE these pulls into your CURRENT selected account?

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.text: The site is still under construction, so there may be bugs, incorrect display of pulls, and other issues. If you find a bug, please report it on Telegram or Discord.

donate.title: Support Goyfield
donate.description: Thank you for using Goyfield.moe! Do not expect posts from me on Boosty and Patreon, but your support will help pay for the servers and allow the project to exist.

home.disclaimer: Goyfield.moe is a fan tracker and database. It is not affiliated with or associated with ©Gryphline. All files are the property of their respective owners.

cookies.title: We use cookies
cookies.text: We use cookies to store your preferences (like theme and language) and analyze site traffic to improve user experience
